creator: shiva.bhanujan@quorum.com
text:
(In reply to Andriy Gapon from comment #6)

We've been testing the modified fix for 10.3 (the diffs that I posted in https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=223803#c5) for a few weeks now, and we haven't had a single crash since.  The systems are fairly loaded, w/ quite a few 'zfs receive' being done.
